ddls:
CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occ_code" TEXT /* Unique occupation code */,
  "occ_title" TEXT /* Title of the occupation */,
  "tot_emp" INTEGER /* Total employment for the occupation */,
  "emp_prse" REAL /* Employment percentage of the occupation */,
  "jobs_1000" REAL /* Jobs per 1000 workers */,
  "loc_quotient" REAL /* Local quotient (concentration of occupation) */,
  "h_mean" REAL /* Mean hourly wage */,
  "a_mean" REAL /* Mean annual salary */,
  "mean_prse" REAL /* Mean percentage of employees earning above a given wage */,
  "h_pct10" REAL /* 10th percentile hourly wage */,
  "h_pct25" REAL /* 25th percentile hourly wage */,
  "h_median" REAL /* Median hourly wage */,
  "h_pct75" REAL /* 75th percentile hourly wage */,
  "h_pct90" TEXT /* 90th percentile hourly wage */,
  "a_pct10" REAL /* 10th percentile annual salary */,
  "a_pct25" REAL /* 25th percentile annual salary */,
  "a_median" REAL /* Median annual salary */,
  "a_pct75" REAL /* 75th percentile annual salary */,
  "a_pct90" REAL /* 90th percentile annual salary */,
  "annual" TEXT /* Annual salary in described currency */,
  "hourly" TEXT /* Hourly wage in described currency */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the industries table */,
  "job_openings" INTEGER /* Number of job openings */,
  "job_openings_status" TEXT /* Status of job openings (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "user_feedback" TEXT /* User feedback on job postings */,
  "educational_requirements" TEXT /* Typical educational requirements for the occupation */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the occupation */,
  "projected_job_openings" INTEGER /* Projected job openings */,
  "historical_data" TEXT /* Historical data (JSON format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occ_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "prim_state" TEXT /* Primary state code (e.g., TX for Texas) */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area code for the region */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area (e.g., Austin-Round Rock-San Marcos, TX) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the region */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, public) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the job posting */,
  "occ_code" TEXT /* Foreign key to the occupations table */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the regions table */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the job posting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job posting */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the job posting */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary range for the job posting */,
  "posted_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who posted the job */,
  "posted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job was posted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job posting (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Application deadline for the job posting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("posting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feedback */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the job_postings table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the industry record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the industry record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_requirements" (
  "req_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the educational requirement */,
  "occ_code" TEXT /* Foreign key to the occupations table */,
  "requirement" TEXT /* Typical educational requirement (e.g., Bachelor's degree, Master's degree) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the educational requirement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the requirement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the requirement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("req_id")
)
column_names: Mean percentage of employees earning above a given wage
